title: The fan of envelopes, each one a different source
subtitle: A short visualisation for building the picture of diversified income arriving at once.
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation practice from Day 31 of the MONEY program. The image: a spread of envelopes, each one a different income source, all arriving in the same post.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation applied to multiple income streams.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from Day 31 of the MONEY program. A spread of envelopes, each one a different income source, all arriving at the same time.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take a slow breath in and let it go.
Picture a table in front of you. On the table, a fan of envelopes, held in both hands like a card hand. Five envelopes. Each one has a different return address.
The first one: a payment from a client. Something you worked on last month. Open it and see the number.
The second: a product sale. Something you built, selling without your involvement.
The third: interest, rent, or a small investment returning. Something that grew on its own.
The fourth and fifth: you choose. They can be anything. Just picture the envelopes as real, with real amounts.
You hold all five. Same week. Same postal drop. Stay with that for a minute, then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation applied to income diversification.
